prompt: Portrait of a Post-human Messiah with a matte white carbon fiber, intricate fiber-optic capillaries, holographic iris projecting status codes, surrounded by ethereal wisps of plasma energy and suspended micro-probes following the head. Lighting: volumetric fog illuminated by neon flares, palette of blood orange and cold steel gray. Technical style: symmetrical composition, intricate details, hyper-realistic, high fidelity.

Portrait of a Celestial Android with a matte white carbon fiber, embedded crystalline processors along the jawline, multi-faceted diamond ocular lenses, surrounded by vortex of swirling quantum energy particles and rotating rings of pure ultraviolet light. Lighting: subtle glitch-art distortions in the air, palette of cyberpunk cyan and electric magenta. Technical style: low angle heroic shot, intricate details, hyper-realistic, high fidelity.

Portrait of a Android Archangel with a sculpted porcelain face, intricate fiber-optic capillaries, glowing sapphire optic sensors, surrounded by aurora-like data streams and rotating rings of pure ultraviolet light. Lighting: dense digital haze with light-streaks, palette of cyberpunk cyan and electric magenta. Technical style: highly detailed textured render, intricate details, hyper-realistic, high fidelity.

Portrait of a Quantum Muse with a iridescent synth-flesh, liquid light conduits flowing like tears, void-black sensory implants with rotating rings, surrounded by pulsing ion-fields creating a corona effect and rotating rings of pure ultraviolet light. Lighting: dramatically backlit by a dying star, palette of blood orange and cold steel gray. Technical style: telephoto lens portrait with shallow depth of field, intricate details, hyper-realistic, high fidelity.
